topic: Detect encoded PowerShell execution in DeviceProcessEvents

content.question: Write a KQL query against the Microsoft Defender XDR DeviceProcessEvents table to detect PowerShell processes launched with encoded command arguments (-EncodedCommand or -enc) in the past 24 hours. Return the device name, account name, command line, initiating process, and timestamp, sorted by most recent first.
content.sample_solution:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe" or FileName =~ "pwsh.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-EncodedCommand", "-enc ", "-ec ")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by Timestamp desc

content.question: Write a KQL query against the Microsoft Sentinel SecurityEvent table to detect password spraying: a single source IP generating more than 20 failed logon attempts (Event ID 4625) targeting at least 5 distinct accounts within a 5-minute window. Return the source IP, attempt count, distinct account count, and time window.
content.sample_solution:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4625
| where LogonType == 3
| summarize AttemptCount = count(), DistinctAccounts = dcount(TargetUserName), StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated) by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where AttemptCount > 20 and DistinctAccounts >= 5
| project IpAddress, AttemptCount, DistinctAccounts, StartTime, EndTime
| sort by AttemptCount desc

topic: Detect anomalous NTLM lateral movement via SecurityEvent 4624

content.question: Write a KQL query against Microsoft Sentinel SecurityEvent to detect potential lateral movement: successful network logons (Event ID 4624, LogonType=3) using NTLM authentication from a single source workstation to more than 3 distinct server targets within 1 hour. Return the source workstation, logon account, target count, and list of target computers.
content.sample_solution:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType == 3
| where AuthenticationPackageName =~ "NTLM"
| where WorkstationName != Computer
| summarize TargetCount = dcount(Computer), Targets = make_set(Computer, 20) by WorkstationName, TargetUserName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where TargetCount > 3
| project WorkstationName, TargetUserName, TargetCount, Targets
| sort by TargetCount desc

topic: Detect Kerberoasting via Event 4769 RC4 ticket requests

content.question: Write a KQL query against Microsoft Sentinel SecurityEvent to detect Kerberoasting: a single user account requesting Kerberos service tickets (Event ID 4769) using RC4-HMAC encryption (TicketEncryptionType=0x17) for more than 3 distinct service accounts within 10 minutes.
content.sample_solution:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4769
| where TicketEncryptionType == "0x17"
| where ServiceName !endswith "$"
| summarize ServiceCount = dcount(ServiceName), Services = make_set(ServiceName, 20), StartTime = min(TimeGenerated) by SubjectUserName, IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where ServiceCount > 3
| project SubjectUserName, IpAddress, ServiceCount, Services, StartTime
| sort by ServiceCount desc

topic: Detect periodic C2 beacon jitter in DeviceNetworkEvents

content.question: Write a KQL query against Microsoft Defender XDR DeviceNetworkEvents to identify hosts with periodic outbound connections to a single remote IP — a beacon signature. For each (DeviceName, RemoteIP) pair, compute connection intervals using make-series, flag pairs with more than 5 connections and an average inter-connection interval between 60 and 600 seconds (1–10 minute beacon range).
content.sample_solution:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| summarize ConnectionTimes = make_list(Timestamp, 500) by DeviceName, RemoteIP
| mv-expand ConnectionTimes to typeof(datetime)
| sort by DeviceName asc, RemoteIP asc, ConnectionTimes asc
| serialize
| extend PrevTime = prev(ConnectionTimes, 1)
| extend IntervalSec = datetime_diff('second', ConnectionTimes, PrevTime)
| where isnotnull(IntervalSec) and IntervalSec > 0
| summarize ConnCount = count(), AvgIntervalSec = avg(IntervalSec), StdDevInterval = stdev(IntervalSec) by DeviceName, RemoteIP
| where ConnCount > 5 and AvgIntervalSec between (60 .. 600)
| project DeviceName, RemoteIP, ConnCount, AvgIntervalSec, StdDevInterval
| sort by ConnCount desc
